title: RHCSA 10 Lab 15: Users Groups And Sudo
description: Create local identities and delegate limited administrative access

tasks: Create user relay10, set the password to cinder9, and make ops10 the user's supplementary group.
Allow members of ops10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password by using a sudoers drop-in.
checks: id -nG relay10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx ops10 && getent shadow relay10 | awk -F: 'length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/ {ok=1} END {exit !ok}'
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
